# Novasoft AI

> Novasoft AI builds AI-powered business assistants that handle customer communication, appointment scheduling, lead follow-up, and automation for small businesses. 24/7 automation that replaces hiring.

Novasoft AI is the agency arm of Jess Mason's AI consulting practice. It specializes in production-grade AI systems including voice agents, lead qualification pipelines, and full-stack AI operations for service businesses.

## Main Sections

- / : Homepage - AI assistant for small business automation
- /features : Feature breakdown of AI assistant capabilities
- /use-cases : Real-world applications and use cases
- /industries : Industry-specific solutions (real estate, healthcare, legal, etc.)
- /case-studies : Client success stories and results
- /tools : Free tools including AI ROI calculator and readiness quiz
- /blog : Educational content on AI automation
- /contact : Book a consultation
- /faq : Frequently asked questions

## Industries Served

- Real Estate
- Home Services (Roofing, HVAC, Plumbing)
- Healthcare (Dental, Medical)
- Legal (Law Firms)
- Financial Services (Accountants)
- Automotive (Dealerships)

## Tools

- /tools/ai-roi-calculator : Calculate ROI of AI automation
- /tools/ai-readiness-quiz : Assess your business's AI readiness
- /tools/hiring-vs-ai : Compare costs of hiring vs AI

- Moltbot: https://moltbot.ceo - Managed AI assistant service
